sourceName: U.S. Census LEHD LODES 2023 Origin-Destination Employment Flows - New York City
notes: Official U.S. Census LEHD Origin-Destination Employment Statistics (LODES) 2023 main OD file for New York workplaces, aggregated from census-block rows to county-pair home/work flows involving Bronx, Kings, New York, Queens, and Richmond counties. Stores aggregate job counts only; no names, exact addresses, devices, or household-level records are imported.
